creator: freebsd@spambox.dk
text:
Yes, all other ports are up to date. "pkg version -L=" has an empty output.

Does the blib/man5 part seem to be correct:
Installing /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-admin.1
Installing /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-check.1
Installing /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-report.1
Installing /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-revoke.1
